pi_items.source: Explicitly queried and targeted in setup_task.sh (unique_identifier = 'DM-TRIAL-2024').
Task description instructs creation of dataset named 'DM2024_Interim_Vitals' and export_result.sh verifies the name using the LIKE pattern '%dm2024%interim%vitals%'.
Explicitly inserted and linked to the event definition in setup_task.sh via SQL.
Explicitly created as a study event definition and linked in setup_task.sh.
Explicitly seeded with random synthetic data in setup_task.sh for subjects 'DM-101', 'DM-102', 'DM-103'.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the subjects (DM-101, DM-102, DM-103), the event 'Baseline Assessment', and the CRF 'Vital Signs' are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the 'DM-TRIAL-2024' study via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. The expected dataset name 'DM2024_Interim_Vitals' matches the task description instructions and export script's database queries.
